title: Velvety Salty Cantonese Chickpeas Stew
description: A silky, savory stew brimming with chickpeas, aromatic ginger, and subtle star anise - perfect for a lazy Sunday lunch thats also diabetesfriendly.
instructions: In a medium pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the minced ginger and garlic, sautéing until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in the crushed star anise and red chili flakes, cooking for another 30 seconds. Pour in the water or broth and bring to a gentle boil. Add the chickpeas and light soy sauce, reducing heat to a simmer. Let the stew cook uncovered for 20 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the sauce to thicken slightly. Remove the star anise piece or crush more if you prefer a more pronounced flavor. Finally, stir in the sliced scallions and serve warm, optionally garnished with a drizzle of sesame oil.
